name: Beans Sauteed with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the string beans thoroughly.
2. Cut off the ends of each bean.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in a large frying pan that can accommodate all the beans in one layer.
4. Add the beans and finely chopped garlic to the pan.
5. Cook, stirring occasionally, until well coated in garlic and oil, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Pour in enough water to cover the beans, then increase heat to maximum.
7. Allow the water to boil away, which should take no more than seven or eight minutes.
8. Once the beans begin to sizzle as the water boils away, sprinkle generously with salt and black pepper.
9. Continue cooking until all the water has evaporated and the beans are ready.
